summary: Full E2E testing of new Maintenance page and redesigned Housekeeping page. All 24 backend tests and all frontend feature flows passed with 100% success rate. No bugs found.
passed_tests: Navigation: Maintenance appears in Operations nav group
Navigation: Clicking Maintenance navigates to /ops/maintenance
Maintenance page: Loads with title 'Maintenance'
Maintenance page: Two tabs present (Upcoming Maintenance Requests + Maintenance Personnel)
Create request: Modal opens with all fields (property, unit, title, description, status, color swatches, access info, personnel, notes, completed checkbox)
Create request: Yellow status color swatch selectable, card appears in list with correct status badge
Edit request: Click card opens modal with pre-filled data, status update saved
Mark as Completed: Checkbox in modal moves request from active to archive
Archive section: Toggle expands, shows completed requests grouped by month (MARCH 2026)
Archive toggle: Shows correct count (1)
Delete request: Hover reveals delete button, confirm removes card
Validation: Empty title shows 'Title is required' toast error
Personnel tab: Add Personnel modal with name/role/contact/notes fields
Personnel tab: New card appears in card list after add
Personnel tab: Edit modal opens with pre-filled data
Personnel tab: Archive button archives personnel, Show Archived toggle works
Personnel tab: Delete removes personnel card
Housekeeping page: Card layout (not table) for all tabs
Housekeeping: Unit numbers show without 'U' prefix (e.g., 7, 8)
Housekeeping: Dates formatted as 'Tue, 3/17' format
Housekeeping: Click cleaning card opens edit modal with checkout time, cleaner, maintenance person, notes, Mark as Done
Housekeeping: Assign Maintenance Person dropdown shows Bob Smith from maintenance personnel
Housekeeping: Amber maintenance indicator (wrench icon + name) appears on card after saving
Housekeepers tab: Card layout with add/edit/archive/delete actions
Housekeeping Leads tab: Card layout with add/delete actions
Backend: GET /api/maintenance-personnel returns 200
Backend: POST /api/maintenance-personnel creates record with name/role/contact
Backend: PUT /api/maintenance-personnel/{id} updates record correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/maintenance-personnel/{id} removes record (404 on non-existent)
Backend: GET /api/maintenance-requests returns 200
Backend: POST /api/maintenance-requests returns 200 with created object (title, status_color, created_at)
Backend: PUT /api/maintenance-requests/{id} updates status correctly
Backend: Mark as completed auto-sets completed_at timestamp
Backend: Completed requests excluded from default GET (include_completed=false)
Backend: Completed requests included in GET with include_completed=true
Backend: DELETE /api/maintenance-requests/{id} removes record (404 on non-existent)
Backend: POST with assigned_personnel list saves correctly
Backend: CleaningRecord PUT with assigned_maintenance_name/maintenance_note saves and returns correctly
Backend: Input validation - missing name/title returns 422
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are correctly set for interactive elements
Error handling with toast notifications is working correctly throughout both pages
Archive grouping by month works correctly (groupByMonth function)
The MaintenancePage.js is 703 lines - borderline but well-organized with clearly separated sub-components. No immediate action needed.

One minor: In HousekeepingPage, showArchived state is shared between Housekeepers and Leads tabs via prop drilling from parent - if user toggles 'Show Archived' in Housekeepers tab, it also affects Leads tab. Minor UX concern, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: TEST_UI_Plumbing Issue (resolved, in archive) and Bob Smith maintenance assignment on Unit 7 cleaning card left from testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Maintenance page (/ops/maintenance) and redesigned Housekeeping page (/ops/housekeeping) are both fully working. All CRUD flows for maintenance requests, personnel, housekeepers, and leads pass. Amber maintenance indicator on cleaning cards works correctly. Test data: 'TEST_UI_Plumbing Issue' is in archive (completed), Bob Smith is assigned to Unit 7 cleaning record from testing.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All features implemented correctly.
